text: Good morning Jarvis! What's on the calendar for this Sunday?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Sunday, May 04. No work meetings today. You have Ethan's soccer practice scheduled and gardening in the front walkway.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Just wanted to mention that having dinner with our friends tonight. We played Catan and Dave Nguyen won at the end. We need to do this more often.
title: Social Update

text: Logged that. I've mapped the locations. Catan matches are always competitive. Dave must have rolled well. Let me know if you need any printouts.
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Quick log: Prepping school lunches for the week. Grilling steaks and chicken on the deck tonight. The kids are always hungry.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Interesting. Yum, that sounds delicious! Perfect grilling weather! I've added hickory chips to the Costco list. I'll set a reminder for lunch prep.
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Doing some cleaning around the house. I think the spark plug on the mower is dirty. Glad I caught it early.
title: Household Update

text: Got it, Mike. Home maintenance is a constant cycle. I can look up a quick spark plug cleaning guide for your mower model. Safety is always the priority.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Just wanted to mention that lily had her gymnastics class at the community center. Ethan's team played a match and won 1-0! It's a busy schedule but worth it.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Understood. That's a big step. What a great win for Frisco FC! He's showing real growth on defense. He's doing great with Mrs. Patterson.
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Ethan and Lily are playing with Cooper in the backyard. Lily fell asleep immediately holding her stuffed elephant. We need to stay consistent with them.
title: Parenting Update

text: Understood. Toddlers are full of energy. A calm routine makes all the difference. Nice contrast to the tantrums. Rest well tonight.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Listening to a podcast in the garage. It was a really interesting history episode. Important to recharge my batteries.
title: Personal Update

text: Logged that. I've adjusted the local settings. History podcasts are great for garage time. I can suggest tech ones too. Enjoy the episode!
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Having dinner with our friends tonight. We are meeting Dave and Kim at a new restaurant. Looking forward to the weekend.
title: Social Update

text: Interesting. Social breaks are great. Enjoy! I've set reservation alerts and mapped the route to Plano. I'll update the calendar alerts.
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Putting together our grocery list. We want to try a home-cooked chicken parmesan on Thursday. It helps to plan ahead.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Logged that. Healthy choices are great. Recipe saved. I've added marinara and mozzarella to the grocery list. Should I check our pantry stock for that?
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Just wanted to mention that the smart-home hub is acting up today. We are planning a garage clean-up day this weekend. Glad I caught it early.
title: Household Update

text: Got it, Mike. I can help troubleshoot that. I'll add heavy-duty storage bins to the Costco list to help organize. I'll update the home maintenance log.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Quick log: Ethan has soccer practice with Frisco FC today. Lily blew bubbles without crying during her swim lessons. It's great to see them having fun.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Logged that. Busy day for sports! That's a major swim milestone! Her confidence is really building. I'll track the schedule.
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Quick update: Bedtime went very smoothly tonight. She was throwing broccoli on the floor demanding fruit snacks. Glad we have a plan.
title: Parenting Update

text: Bedtime can be a challenge. Toddler nutrition is a constant negotiation. Blending veggies into sauce works well. I've updated the grocery list.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Just wanted to mention that listening to a podcast in the garage. My starting running back is questionable. It is nice to have some quiet time.
title: Personal Update

text: Interesting. Good way to wrap up the day. Injury report checked. Playing your backup is the safer option. Enjoy the episode!
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Hey Jarvis, logging my evening reflection. Productive Saturday fixing things around the house. Ethan had fun with soccer, and Lily did great. Enjoyed a cold craft beer on the deck. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Journal logged, Mike. Rest well and I'll see you tomorrow.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
